purpose: Eval-only best-checkpoint freeze for the Rung-2 incumbent. The stabilization run (run_id f6dad85ec9df4d58, commit 06406a7) wandered in success but PASSED THROUGH a fully clean, 100%-joint-success checkpoint. This pre-registration fixes the selection rule and the seed split BEFORE the held-out validation is run, so the freeze is honest model selection (standard early-stopping made rigorous by disjoint held-out validation), not cherry-picking.

unchanged_bar.success_predicate: is_placed & is_level & is_unstressed & both_static & is_settled (cocarry.py:1031); UNCHANGED
unchanged_bar.stress_penalty_constants: the banked 110/20 re-grounding is KEPT and re-frozen (COCARRY_REWARD_STRESS_SOFT_THRESHOLD_N=110, COCARRY_REWARD_STRESS_TANH_SCALE_N=20)

selection_rule: Among the saved checkpoints, choose the one with the highest matched joint-success rate on the SELECTION seed set S that is ALSO constraint-clean (all-seed max tilt < 15 deg AND all-seed max stress < 130 N). Ties broken toward the EARLIER checkpoint (less overfit). Deterministic eval (P6).

validation_acceptance.holds_if: matched joint success on V >= 0.90 (the reach band) AND comfortable margins: all-seed max tilt strictly < 15 deg without riding the limit, AND stress p90 and max comfortably below 130 N (not edge-riding).
validation_acceptance.brittle_if: V success < 0.90, OR tilt rides/exceeds the 15 deg limit on fresh seeds, OR stress rides the 130 N edge. -> STOP, the peak was seed-specific; escalation (warm-start from the matched impedance controller -> residual-on-impedance) is the founder's call.

candidate_determination: Mechanical from the rule. Per the already-observed S trajectory (committed in cocarry_rung2_stabilization_stop.json: 50k=92% but tilt_max 46 deg NOT clean; 100k=100% with tilt_max 13.1 deg, stress_max 80 N CLEAN), the earliest constraint-clean 100% checkpoint is 100k. Because 100% is the success ceiling and ties resolve to the earlier checkpoint, no later checkpoint can displace 100k. The selection eval below re-confirms over ALL 18 saved checkpoints; the freeze candidate is the 100000-step checkpoint.
honesty_statement: As of this committed file, the validation seed set V (20000-20023) has NOT been evaluated on any checkpoint. The selection seed set S has been evaluated (it is the selection set, by construction). The validation result is computed only AFTER this pre-registration is committed.
repro_command: bash scripts/repro/cocarry_rung2_train.sh 900000 0 12  (the run that produced the checkpoints); selection+validation eval via the committed eval over chamber.benchmarks.cocarry_incumbent.evaluate_incumbent_matched
